---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

This is an [R Markdown](http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com) Notebook. When you execute code within the notebook, the results appear beneath the code. 

Try executing this chunk by clicking the *Run* button within the chunk or by placing your cursor inside it and pressing *Ctrl+Shift+Enter*. 

```{r}
plot(cars)
```

Add a new chunk by clicking the *Insert Chunk* button on the toolbar or by pressing *Ctrl+Alt+I*.

When you save the notebook, an HTML file containing the code and output will be saved alongside it (click the *Preview* button or press *Ctrl+Shift+K* to preview the HTML file).

The preview shows you a rendered HTML copy of the contents of the editor. Consequently, unlike *Knit*, *Preview* does not run any R code chunks. Instead, the output of the chunk when it was last run in the editor is displayed.

```{r}
df <- read_dta("C:/Users/19175/Downloads/hewang2017.dta")
head(df)
```

```{r}
library(haven)
library(zoo)
library(plm)
library(lmtest)
library(sandwich)
library(tidyverse)
library(ivreg)
```


```{r}
df_rel <- data.frame(matrix(ncol=(length(colnames(df)) + 3)))
colnames(df_rel) <- c(colnames(df), "rel_yr", "yr_treated", "rel_yr_unagg")

for (vill in unique(hewang$village)) {
  subset = df[df$village == vill,]
  if (dim(subset[subset$cgvo == 1,])[1] == 0) {
    subset$rel_yr <- rep(-100, dim(subset)[1])
    subset$yr_treated <- rep(-100, dim(subset)[1])
  }
  else if (dim(subset[subset$cgvo == 0,])[1] == 0) {
    subset$rel_yr <- rep(100, dim(subset)[1])
    subset$yr_treated <- rep(100, dim(subset)[1])
  }
  else {
    subset$yr_treated <- min(subset[subset$cgvo == 1,]$year)
    subset$rel_yr <- subset$year - subset$yr_treated
  }
  subset$rel_yr_unagg <- subset$rel_yr
  df_rel <- rbind(df_rel, subset)
}
df_rel <- df_rel[2:dim(df_rel)[1],]
```


```{r}
head(df_rel)
```
```{r}
df_rel[(df_rel$rel_yr < -4) & (df_rel$rel_yr > -50),]$rel_yr <- -4
df_rel[(df_rel$rel_yr > 3) & (df_rel$rel_yr < 50),]$rel_yr <- 3
```

```{r}
library(fastDummies)
colnames_o <- colnames(df_rel)
df_rel <-  fastDummies::dummy_cols(df_rel, select_columns="rel_yr")
```


```{r}
df_rel
```

```{r}
colnames(df_rel) <- c(colnames_o, 'rel_yr_minusone',
'rel_yr_minustwo', 'rel_yr_minusthree', 'rel_yr_minusfour',
'rel_yr_NT', 'rel_yr_zero',
'rel_yr_one', 'rel_yr_two', 'rel_yr_three')
```

```{r}
df_rel
```



```{r}

fig_2_plot <- function(outcome_var, title) {
  
f <- paste(outcome_var, "~",
paste(c("rel_yr_minusfour", "rel_yr_minusthree", "rel_yr_minustwo",
        "rel_yr_zero", "rel_yr_one", "rel_yr_two", "rel_yr_three",
        "precipitation", "temperature", "as.factor(year)"), collapse
= " + "), sep = " ")
print(f)
lm <- plm(data=df_rel, method="within", f)

rows <- c("rel_yr_minusfour", "rel_yr_minusthree", "rel_yr_minustwo",
        "rel_yr_zero", "rel_yr_one", "rel_yr_two", "rel_yr_three")
results <- data.frame(matrix(0, nrow=length(rows), ncol=2))
rownames(results) <- rows
colnames(results) <- c("coef", "se")

results[,"coef"] <- lm$coefficients[1:7]
vc <- clubSandwich::vcovCR(lm, cluster=df_rel$district, type="CR0")
results[,"se"] = sqrt(diag(vc))[1:7]

ggplot(data=results, aes(x=c(-4, -3, -2, 0, 1, 2, 3), y=coef)) +
geom_point() +
geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=coef - 1.96 * se, ymax=coef + 1.96 * se)) +
theme_bw() +
geom_vline(xintercept=-1, linetype="dotted") +
geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dotted") +
scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(from=-4, to=3, by=1)) +
labs(
x = "Relative years",
y = "Estimated coefficients",
title = title
)

}

```


```{r}
fig_2_plot("l_subsidy_rate", "Panel A")
```
```{r}
fig_2_plot("l_poor_housing_rate", "Panel B")
```
```{r}
fig_2_plot("l_poor_reg_rate", "Panel C")
```
```{r}
fig_2_plot("l_disability_rate", "Panel D")
```

```{r}
df_rel_imp <- df_rel[!(df_rel$yr_treated == 100) & !(df_rel$yr_treated == 2000),]
```


```{r}
library(broom)
```


```{r}
imputation <- function(data.in) {
# Step one
print(data.in[(data.in$rel_yr < 0),])
lr.imp <- lm(data = data.in %>% filter(rel_yr < 0),
             l_subsidy_rate ~ as.factor(year) + as.factor(yr_treated) +
               temperature + precipitation + as.factor(village))

# Step two
data.in %>%
mutate(l_subsidy_rate.imp = l_subsidy_rate - predict(lr.imp, newdata=data.in)) %>%
lm(formula = l_subsidy_rate.imp ~ as.factor(rel_yr))

}


plot_imputed_results <- function(title) {

lr_imp <- df_rel_imp %>% imputation()

vc <- vcovCL(lr_imp, cluster=~district, type="HC0")
se <- sqrt(diag(vc))[3:9]

df_rel_imp %>%
  imputation %>%
  tidy() %>%
  select(term, coef=estimate) -> results_imp

results_imp <- results_imp[3:9,]
results_imp %>%
mutate(
se=se,
cilb = coef - 1.96 * se,
ciub = coef + 1.96 * se
) -> results_imp

print(results_imp)
terms = terms = c(-4, -3, -2, 0, 1, 2, 3)
results_imp$term = terms
results_imp = results_imp[order(results_imp$term),]
## Creating the plot
ggplot(data=results_imp, aes(x=term, y=coef)) +
geom_point() +
geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=cilb, ymax=ciub)) +
theme_bw() +
geom_vline(xintercept=-1, linetype="dotted") +
geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dotted") +
scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(from=-4, to=3, by=1)) +
labs(
x = "Relative year",
y = "Estimated coefficients",
title = title
)
  
}
  
```


```{r}
plot_imputed_results("Panel A (Imputed)")
```

```{r}
df_rel_imp <- df_rel_imp[!(df_rel_imp$year == 2000),]
```


```{r}
imputation <- function(data.in) {
# Step one
lr.imp <- lm(data = data.in %>% filter(rel_yr < 0),
             l_poor_housing_rate ~ as.factor(year) + as.factor(yr_treated) + precipitation
             + temperature + as.factor(village))

# Step two
data.in %>%
mutate(l_poor_housing_rate.imp = l_poor_housing_rate - predict(lr.imp, newdata=data.in)) %>%
lm(formula = l_poor_housing_rate.imp ~ as.factor(rel_yr))

}


plot_imputed_results <- function(title) {

lr_imp <- df_rel_imp %>% imputation() 

vc <- vcovCL(lr_imp, cluster=~district, type="HC0")
se <- sqrt(diag(vc))[3:9]

df_rel_imp %>%
  imputation %>%
  tidy() %>%
  select(term, coef=estimate) -> results_imp

results_imp <- results_imp[3:9,]
results_imp %>%
mutate(
se=se,
cilb = coef - 1.96 * se,
ciub = coef + 1.96 * se
) -> results_imp

print(results_imp)
terms = c(-4, -3, -2, 0, 1, 2, 3)
results_imp$term = terms
results_imp = results_imp[order(results_imp$term),]
## Creating the plot
ggplot(data=results_imp, aes(x=term, y=coef)) +
geom_point() +
geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=cilb, ymax=ciub)) +
theme_bw() +
geom_vline(xintercept=-1, linetype="dotted") +
geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dotted") +
scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(from=-4, to=3, by=1)) +
labs(
x = "Relative year",
y = "Estimated coefficients",
title = title
)
  
}
```

```{r}
plot_imputed_results("Panel B (Imputed)")
```

```{r}
imputation <- function(data.in) {
# Step one
lr.imp <- lm(data = data.in %>% filter(rel_yr < 0),
             l_poor_reg_rate ~ as.factor(year) + as.factor(yr_treated) + precipitation
             + temperature + as.factor(village))

print("hi")
# Step two
data.in %>%
mutate(l_poor_reg_rate.imp = l_poor_reg_rate - predict(lr.imp, newdata=data.in)) %>%
lm(formula = l_poor_reg_rate.imp ~ as.factor(rel_yr))

}


plot_imputed_results <- function(title) {

lr_imp <- df_rel_imp %>% imputation()

vc <- vcovCL(lr_imp, cluster=~district, type="HC0")
se <- sqrt(diag(vc))[3:9]

df_rel_imp %>%
  imputation %>%
  tidy() %>%
  select(term, coef=estimate) -> results_imp

results_imp <- results_imp[3:9,]
results_imp %>%
mutate(
se=se,
cilb = coef - 1.96 * se,
ciub = coef + 1.96 * se
) -> results_imp

print(results_imp)
terms = c(-4, -3, -2, 0, 1, 2, 3)
results_imp$term = terms
results_imp = results_imp[order(results_imp$term),]
## Creating the plot
ggplot(data=results_imp, aes(x=term, y=coef)) +
geom_point() +
geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=cilb, ymax=ciub)) +
theme_bw() +
geom_vline(xintercept=-1, linetype="dotted") +
geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dotted") +
scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(from=-4, to=3, by=1)) +
labs(
x = "Relative year",
y = "Estimated coefficients",
title = title
)
  
}

plot_imputed_results("Panel C (Imputed)")
```

```{r}
df_rel_imp <- df_rel_imp[!(df_rel_imp$year %in% c(2000,2001,2002)),]
df_rel_imp <- df_rel_imp[!(df_rel_imp$yr_treated == 2003),]
df_rel_imp <- df_rel_imp[!(df_rel_imp$village %in% c(12, 197, 203, 243, 288, 290)),]

imputation <- function(data.in) {
# Step one
lr.imp <- lm(data = data.in %>% filter(rel_yr < 0),
             l_disability_rate ~ as.factor(year) + as.factor(yr_treated) + precipitation
             + temperature + as.factor(village))

print("hi")
# Step two
data.in %>%
mutate(l_disability_rate.imp = l_disability_rate - predict(lr.imp, newdata=data.in)) %>%
lm(formula = l_disability_rate.imp ~ as.factor(rel_yr))

}


plot_imputed_results <- function(title) {

lr_imp <- df_rel_imp %>% imputation()

vc <- vcovCL(lr_imp, cluster=~district, type="HC0")
se <- sqrt(diag(vc))[3:9]

df_rel_imp %>%
  imputation %>%
  tidy() %>%
  select(term, coef=estimate) -> results_imp

results_imp <- results_imp[3:9,]
results_imp %>%
mutate(
se=se,
cilb = coef - 1.96 * se,
ciub = coef + 1.96 * se
) -> results_imp

print(results_imp)
terms = c(-4, -3, -2, 0, 1, 2, 3)
results_imp$term = terms
results_imp = results_imp[order(results_imp$term),]
## Creating the plot
ggplot(data=results_imp, aes(x=term, y=coef)) +
geom_point() +
geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=cilb, ymax=ciub)) +
theme_bw() +
geom_vline(xintercept=-1, linetype="dotted") +
geom_hline(yintercept=0, linetype="dotted") +
scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(from=-4, to=3, by=1)) +
labs(
x = "Relative year",
y = "Estimated coefficients",
title = title
)
  
}

plot_imputed_results("Panel D (Imputed)")
```
